name: TestIso11783IL_PDDSetValue
title: TestIso11783IL_PDDSetValue
tables: long TestIso11783IL_PDDSetValue( dbNode node, dbSignal signal, dword elementNumber, float value );
long TestIso11783IL_PDDSetValue( dbNode node, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, float value );

Sets the value of a process variable. Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
node Simulation node to apply the function.
signal signal from the database The attribute ddi must have been defined for the signal. The signal must be defined in the same database as the node!
value new value of the process variable
0: function has been executed successfully <0: an error has occurred
